titleStmt.title: Letter from the Irish Relief Fund Bazaar to Edward Hamilton Daly, 7 October 1916
Letters 1916-1923
titleStmt.author: The Irish Relief Fund Bazaar

editionStmt.p: This work was originally published by Maynooth University in Ireland in 2017. In 2026 this data, stored in a relational database was extracted and converted into this TEI/XML document.

availability.p: This is an open access work licensed under Creative Commons Attribution NonCommercial 4.0 International license (CC BY-NC 4.0).

note.p: A letter from Samuel McCrackin providing Edward Hamilton Daly with information about the Irish Relief Fund Bazaar which raised money for the families of the Irish martyrs and prisoners. The bazaar took place in New York City, from October 14-22, 1916 at Madison Square Garden.Samuel McCrackin was the Manager of The Irish Relief Fund Bazaar.

msIdentifier.collection: The American Irish Historical Society Collection, Secretary General Correspondence, Box 41, Folder 6

correspAction.placeName: Madison Square Garden, New York, New York, United States
54 Wall Street, New York, New York, United States

projectDesc.p: The data in these XML files was generated based on a data dump from the Magellan database (https://github.com/Maynooth-Center-for-Digital-Humanities/Magellan). Each database record has been converted to a JSON file (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/json). The element section of the JSON file contains the TEI-encoded contents of the letters. The TEI XML has been cleaned and made well-formed using a Python script (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/src).

body.ab:
October 7 1916 Mr. Edw. Hamilton Daly, 54 Wall St., New York City Dear Sir:- We enclose your herewith four tickets
for the Irish Bazaar, Fair and Circus, for the
benefit of the Families of Irish Martyrs and
Prisoners, under the auspices of the The Irish Re-
lief Fund; to be held at Madison Square Garden,
October 14th to 22nd, Afternoon and Evening. To help the cause we are in hopes that
you can use or dispose of these tickets and if
not, kindly return the tickets in the enclosed
stamped envelope. Please make check payable to Samuel
McCrackin, Manager of The Irish Relief Fund
Bazaar, Madison Square Garden, New York. Very truly yours. Samuel McCrackin
